title: After the Yasuda Kinen: Heating Up

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho puts in an incredible performance,
electrifying the crowds at the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back on the training track, Zenno Rob Roy gets
even more fired up when she hears about the
results of the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who will be the protagonist of this story, the
witch who has finally completed her incantation,
or the newly awakened hero? We'll find out at the
Takarazuka Kinen.
